overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dark, stormy jungle village at night. The scene features wooden huts, dense tropical vegetation, and distant warm lighting from village buildings against an overcast night sky. The atmosphere is ominous with low visibility and misty haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark jungle village path with overhanging trees

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dark dirt path between wooden structures and dense jungle foliage

entered.detail: tall tree with hanging vines silhouetted against the night sky
rough wooden barrier lining the right side of the path
building with warm yellow light visible in the far distance
dark mountain range visible against the cloudy night sky
unpaved trail winding through the village

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a very dark jungle village path at night. The camera moves forward along a dirt trail flanked by a large vine-covered tree on the left and wooden fencing on the right. In the distance, a single lit building provides the only illumination against the stormy overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with illuminated wooden buildings

events.description: ambient illumination increases as camera approaches the lit village buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the central lit buildings, revealing more details of the wooden village structures

entered.detail: small wooden shack with dark walls and fenced porch on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, the large jungle tree recedes to the left background while a wooden hut becomes prominent on the right. The distant lit building grows larger and brighter in the center frame, casting more light on the surrounding dirt path and wooden fences. The mountain silhouette disappears behind as the path opens into the village center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, stormy jungle village that gradually transitions from a secluded trail into a more illuminated central area. It begins on a dim dirt path flanked by a massive vine-covered tree and wooden fencing, with only a single distant building providing a faint glow against the overcast night sky. As the camera advances, the large tree recedes into the background while a wooden hut emerges on the right, narrowing the focus toward the village interior. The distant light grows larger and brighter in the center frame, casting an increasing glow over the surrounding fences and path. The scene finally opens into the village center as the silhouette of the mountains disappears behind the camera.
